texto: Racial profiling punishes innocent individuals for the past actions of those who look and sound like them. It misdirects crucial resources and undercuts the trust needed between law enforcement and the communities they serve. It has no place in our national discourse, and no place in our nation's police departments.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Benjamin Todd Jealous: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Racial profiling punishes innocent individuals for the past actions of those who look and sound l…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, law, past pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de past e police.
